functions.name: mm_eth.vault.set_keys_from_vault
documentation: It works with KV version=1 only!!!

functions.name: mm_eth.abi.parse_function_signatures
documentation: returns dict, key: function_name_and_types, value: 4bytes signature

params.name: typer.Option(..., "--url", "-u", help="Url to keys, for example https://vault.site.com:8200/v1/kv/keys1")
typer.Option(..., "--token", "-t", prompt=True, hide_input=True, prompt_required=False, help="A vault token")
typer.Option(..., "--file", "-f", help="Path to a file with private keys")
typer.Option("--hex2dec", "-d", help="Print result in decimal value")

class_variables.name: mm_eth.rpc.TxData.block_number
documentation: for pending tx it can be none
